AUCTIONS.name: BTS MOTS:7 Album (Signed)
AUCTIONS.description: Ultra-rare Map of the Soul: 7 album signed by all 7 BTS members at the 2020 Festa event. Authenticated with certificate of authenticity.

AUCTIONS.name: Blackpink Concert VIP Photocard Set
AUCTIONS.description: Exclusive VIP photocard bundle from the BORN PINK world tour. All 4 members, holographic limited print.

AUCTIONS.name: NewJeans Limited Bunny Doll Set
AUCTIONS.description: Official NewJeans bunny character plush set (5 members). Limited 500 units worldwide. Never opened.

AUCTIONS.name: SEVENTEEN Signed Carat Bong
AUCTIONS.description: Carat Bong Ver.3 signed by all 13 members at the SVT POWER OF LOVE concert. With official authentication.

AUCTIONS.name: Stray Kids Limited Photobook
AUCTIONS.description: 5-STAR world tour official photobook limited edition. Numbered 088/500. Includes exclusive photocards.

AUCTIONS.name: BTS J-Hope Signed Album
AUCTIONS.description: J-Hope's solo debut album 'Jack in the Box' — orange vinyl, hand-signed with personalised message.

AUCTIONS.name: BTS Holographic Photocard — Limited Edition
AUCTIONS.description: Ultra-rare holographic BTS group photocard from the 2023 Proof Collector's Edition. Sealed in original acrylic display case. One of only 500 produced worldwide.

AUCTIONS.name: aespa SYNK HYPERLINE Tour Poster (Signed)
AUCTIONS.description: Limited run A1 concert poster from aespa SYNK:HYPERLINE tour, signed by all 4 members.
